title: Sgt
description: sgt-pet.com zoominfo.com/c/sgt/370244282 SGT founded in 1981 and based in France, is a specialist in PET and RPET packaging . The company designs and manufactures PET/RPET preforms (mono- and multi-layer), HDPE caps, and bottles for the beverage and industrial sectors . With over 200 employees, 26 injection presses, and two recycled PET (SGR) factories, SGT is strongly committed to eco-responsibility and circular packaging .
